; reTasker: add an "open viewer" button to the home-screen launch bar.
;
; Targets HomeScreen.CreateMenu (the pill-shaped bar at the bottom of the
; home screen containing the search lens and the "+" create button). The bar
; is Item#root > Rectangle#primaryContainer > RowLayout#primaryLayout; we
; append one more button to that row. Tapping it asks AppLoad to launch the
; reTasker viewer fullscreen. Because the viewer is a fullscreen overlay,
; closing it drops the user straight back to the home screen.
;
; We inline a self-contained MouseArea rather than reuse CreateMenu's local
; `component Action: MouseArea`: qmldiff does not resolve a file-local inline
; component for nodes it INSERTs, so `Action {}` binds to an imported Action
; type (onTriggered, no onClicked) and CreateMenu fails to compile which,
; being the home screen, boot-loops xochitl. MouseArea is a core QtQuick type
; (always resolvable, has onClicked); the layout mirrors the local component.
;
; Unhashed on purpose: Xochitl ships its QML as plaintext, so real identifiers
; match directly and we avoid a hashtab dependency. LOCATE AFTER ALL appends to
; the row (positional; qmldiff's Type#id matcher can't target the inline
; component instances by type either).

AFFECT /qt/qml/xofm/libs/homescreen/qml/CreateMenu.qml
    IMPORT net.asivery.AppLoad 1.0

    TRAVERSE Item#root > Rectangle#primaryContainer > RowLayout#primaryLayout
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            MouseArea {
                id: retaskerOpenViewer
                objectName: "retasker-open-viewer-button"
                Layout.alignment: Qt.AlignHCenter
                Layout.minimumWidth: height
                Layout.fillHeight: true
                onClicked: AppLoadLauncher.launchApplication("retasker", [], ({}), false)
                ColumnLayout {
                    anchors.centerIn: parent
                    spacing: 0
                    ArkControls.Icon {
                        Layout.alignment: Qt.AlignHCenter
                        size: ArkControls.Values.iconSize.medium
                        source: "qrc:/ark/icons/checkmark_circle"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
